Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
com.fakkaflow.data.model.Transaction
public class Transaction extends Object
Represents a financial transaction (income or expense). Each transaction is linked to a user and a category, and includes amount, type, and timestamp.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Transaction()
    Default constructor.
    Transaction(int userId, float amount, String type, int categoryId, String note)
    Creates a new transaction.

  • Constructor Details

    • Transaction

      public Transaction()
      Default constructor.

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(int userId, float amount, String type, int categoryId, String note)
      Creates a new transaction.
      Parameters:
      userId - ID of the user
      amount - transaction amount
      type - type of transaction (income or expense)
      categoryId - category ID
      note - optional note
